title: Adventure Overhaul+
description: Enhance your experience with a single mod pack that includes numerous exciting mods and optimizations.
body: # ![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1efeabbe329b5ffe0d65e229ccf4e380bf0254a5.png) Adventure Overhaul+ ## Basic Info **Adventure Overhaul+** is a modpack to optimize, improve visuals & gameplay, and add many new features to your game. This modpack contains over 380+ mods! This modpack is made by combining [Better Adventures+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-adventures-plus) (made by [flowstate](https://www.youtube.com/@flowstatevideo)) and my private modpack with some other mods. \***Most**\* of the mods in this modpack will also run on Quilt. Also, feel free to change any mod's config to make it work best for you. **Notice: To avoid any legal issues, version 2.0.0 and above this modpack will not include any resource pack or shaders.** ## Recommended stuff ### Resource packs - Use [this Vanilla Tweaks resource pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#qWJPkQ) which I've already changed the settings for. Feel free to modify it to your liking! (Download it from [this](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#qWJPkQ) link, then drag & drop it into a box that says _"_**Choose a pack** to edit or drag it here._"_ on [this](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) page) - Use [Astraliyte's Animated Textures](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/astraliyte-s-animated-textures/) resource pack to add more animations to items. - Use [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) and [Motschen's Better Leaves ADD-on](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/motschens-better-leaves-add) to get bushy leaves that are compatible with many mods. - Use [Enhanced Audio](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-audio) for more realistic sounds. - Use [Better Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-lanterns) for... well, better lanterns! - Use [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) for more mob animations. - Use [Porkier Piglins (w/ Fresh Animations compat)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/porkier-piglins-x-fresh-animations) for more variations of piglins. ### Shader Use [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) for the best visuals. Or use [Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader) (recommended) for great visuals while still getting a solid FPS. ### Other I recommend playing this modpack in **single-player** mode since most of the mods are **not client-side**. You can also use [ESSENTIAL](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) (not included in the modpack) to play with friends if they have this modpack installed. ## Support me!
